package rulecoverage

func PositiveHttpListenNonTls() string {
    ruleID := "http_listen_non_tls"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`http.ListenAndServe` (non-TLS) usage in production-like code (not test files, not localhost bindings)"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
